title: Federated SELECT with nesting leads to write permission error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
UPDATE test_table SET name = NULL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Nesting in federated SELECT causes write permission error
